flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Barton College fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (43.6% → 35.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Barton College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (51.8% → 45.9%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Barton College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.4k → $37.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Barton College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.4k → $37.2k).
